title: aster breyninus
intro: Aster breyninus, also known as White Horehound, is a perennial plant species native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its white or pale yellow flowers and hairy stems. It has been used in traditional medicine for its expectorant properties, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Aster breyninus include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, making it a popular remedy for colds, fever, and stomach issues. Herbal preparations of Aster breyninus can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
